transcript: Speaker A: काम सारा मैं करूँ और प्रमोशन कोई और ले जाता है। ये इंग्लिश मेरी सबसे बड़ी प्रॉब्लम बन गयी है। [I do all the work and someone else gets the promotion. This English has become my biggest problem.] Speaker B: मैं SpeakX की AI टीचर हूँ। मैं तुम्हें सिर्फ २ हफ़्तों में फ्लूएंट इंग्लिश बोलना सिखा सकती हूँ। [I am SpeakX's AI teacher. I can teach you to speak fluent English in just 2 weeks.] Speaker A: दो हफ़्तों में? पर कैसे? मैं तो बोलते ही अटक जाता हूँ। [In two weeks? But how? I get stuck as soon as I speak.] Speaker B: डोंट वरी, मैं हूँ ना। SpeakX ऐप पर सिर्फ रोज़ १० से १५ मिनट मेरे साथ प्रैक्टिस करो। हिंदी, मराठी, पंजाबी, गुजराती किसी भी भाषा में बात करके इंग्लिश सीख सकते हो। बस ऐप डाउनलोड करो और आज से प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। [Don't worry, I'm here. Practice with me for just 10 to 15 minutes daily on the SpeakX app. You can learn English by speaking in Hindi, Marathi, Punjabi, Gujarati, or any language. Just download the app and start practicing today.]
on_screen_text: kaam saara [all the work] aur promotion koi [and someone else gets the promotion] sabse badi problem [biggest problem] Main SpeakX ki [I am SpeakX's] AI teacher hoon. [AI teacher.] do hafton mein [in two weeks] par kaise? [but how?] Don't worry main hona [Don't worry I'm here] SpeakX app par. [on SpeakX app.] 10 se 15 minute [10 to 15 minutes] Hindi, Marathi, [Hindi, Marathi,] Punjabi, Gujarati [Punjabi, Gujarati] English seekh [learn English] Bas app download karo [Just download the app] aur aaj se practice [and practice from today] shuru karo. [start.]
summary: A frustrated employee laments losing promotions due to poor English skills. An AI avatar introduces the SpeakX app as a solution, offering daily 10-15 minute practice sessions in multiple regional languages. The ad concludes with a call to download the app and start practicing.
